notes: Sync runs in the background and no longer blocks the UI. Removed the per-edit auto-sync triggers — changes to configs, trainer, mods, and Thunderstore installs no longer kick off a push immediately. Cloud sync now happens via the existing 30s poll, the initial pull on launch, and a single push when Valheim exits. The full-screen 'sync in progress' overlay on Mods/Browse/Configs is gone, so every tab stays usable while a push or pull runs.
